name: Dosing Capsule Liquid Pads - MIGHTY & CRAFTY
summary: Dosing Capsule Liquid Pads - MIGHTY & CRAFTY — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: Maximise your vaping experience with Dosing Capsule Liquid Pads - MIGHTY & CRAFTY, perfect for use with concentrate or wax on your Crafty or Mighty vaporiser. Replace the pad with a fresh one to fully enjoy the flavour of your wax vapors. This Storz & Bickel certified product is made from stainless steel for a premium vaping experience. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
